title: Grade Changes and Incompletes
content:
Grade Changes and Incompletes
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for FACULTY AND STAFF use. Instructors initiate grade changes and incomplete requests through Websis Self-Service.

---

ACCESSING THE FORM
Initiate a grade change from Websis Self-Service under "Service Requests".

---

STEP 1: ENTER YOUR NAME
Enter your full name (Instructor's Name) as the person initiating the grade change.

---

STEP 2: ENTER STUDENT INFORMATION
Enter the student's 8-digit ID number along with their first and last name. You can find this via Faculty Self Service in Websis.

---

STEP 3: ENTER TERM INFORMATION
Enter the term information, college, and subject for the course.

---

STEP 4: ENTER COURSE AND CRN
Enter the Course Number and the 5-digit CRN (Course Reference Number). You can find the CRN via faculty grade entry in Websis.

---

STEP 5: ENTER GRADE INFORMATION AND REASON

Current Grade: Enter the student's current grade on record. You can verify this via Websis or Degreeworks.

New Grade: Enter the grade you are requesting it be changed to.

Reason for Change: Select one of the following:
- Incomplete: Only available if the grading deadline has not yet passed. Incompletes auto-convert to "F" if not approved by the end of the next term.
- Calculation/Entry Error: The original grade was entered incorrectly.
- Grade Not Entered by Deadline: If "NG" appears on the student's record, it means the grading deadline was missed.

---

STEP 6: ATTACH REQUIRED DOCUMENTATION

Syllabus: Must include the grading scale with total possible points and letter grade equivalency.

Gradebook: Must show the total points earned by the student. The points must match the grading scale in the syllabus. The Office of Registrar will not perform calculations on your behalf.

Grading Memo: Typically only required for graduate dissertation or thesis courses.

---

NOTIFICATION AND STATUS
You will receive an email notification once the grade change has been approved. You can check the status of your request on the dashboard at any time.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Grade Change Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/174ixCMl1kZ1Q7U2RKNknUz-XGd_tMlIn/view)
